## Pull request checklist

- [ ] I described what changed and why.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where relevant.
- [ ] I ran local checks (`nextflow config`, `nf-test`, and/or `pytest` as applicable).
- [ ] I updated docs (`docs/usage.md`, `docs/output.md`) if behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes.
- [ ] I checked that there are no unintended file changes.
